name: Caramel Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sweet cream or Half & Half
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream, butter, brown sugar, and salt in a bowl.
2. Place the mixture over low heat.
3. Stir until the sugar is dissolved. Do not let it boil!
4. Remove from heat and stir in the confectioners' sugar and vanilla.
5. Stir until cool enough to spread on a 9-inch cake.
